name: Chocolate Banana Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 3 oz. package of regular chocolate pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mixer bowl.
2. Beat at medium speed until mixed, then increase to high speed and mix for 4 minutes.
3. Pour the batter into 2 (9-inch) or 3 (8-inch) greased and waxed paper-lined cake pans.
4. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Frost with your favorite frosting once cooled.
